name.description: Full name of the credit card

previous_names.description: Prior names this card was known by, e.g. before a rebrand. Rendered on the card detail page.

our_take.description: Editorial paragraph rendered in the 'Our take' block on the card detail page. Optional; when omitted the block is hidden (only the Featured-in chips render, if the card is top-3 on a /best/ list).

accepting_applications.description: Whether the card is currently accepting new applications

value.description: Promotional annual fee charged during the intro window (e.g. 0 for a waived-first-year card)

months.description: Length of the intro window in months (use 12 for first-year-waived offers)

annual_fee_intro.description: Promotional annual fee for the first N months. Card detail page renders this alongside the regular annual_fee (optional).

foreign_transaction_fee.description: Whether the card charges a foreign transaction fee. true = card charges a foreign transaction fee; false = no foreign transaction fees on international purchases (optional)

release_date.description: Card release date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional)

tags.description: Card tags for categorization and filtering (optional)

apply_link.description: Direct application URL for the card (optional)

special_apply_link.description: Targeted offer URL — used for the Apply button and for signup-bonus extraction by check-card-pages.js when set. Falls back to apply_link. Use when the card's headline SUB lives on a different page than the generic marketing page (e.g. Fidelity's /go/ offer pages).

card_referral_link.description: Base URL for referral links - user codes are appended to this (optional)

referral_bonus.description: Short bonus label shown on the 'Apply with referral' button, e.g. '+$100' (optional)

expires.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the reward stops earning, for limited-time promos like the Chase Lyft 5%. Structured so the card page can badge it and build-cards can flag it once past — instead of the end date living only in free-text notes.

eligible_categories.description: Category IDs eligible for this flexible reward

choices.description: Number of categories to pick (user_choice mode)

note.description: Slot-specific note shown when this card is surfaced under this category

current_categories.description: Currently active categories (quarterly_rotating mode). Each entry is a category id or {category, note}.

current_period.description: Current rotation period label, e.g. Q1 2026

spend_cap.description: Maximum dollar spend that earns the headline `value` rate (e.g. 50000 for 'first $50K/yr'). Once exceeded, the cardholder earns `rate_after_cap` (or 1 if unspecified). Combined with `cap_period`.

cap_period.description: Time window over which `spend_cap` resets. Defaults to 'annual'.

rate_after_cap.description: Reward rate (in the same `unit`) earned on spend above `spend_cap`. Defaults to 1 (i.e. 1% or 1x) when unspecified.

merchant_specific.description: Set true when this category bonus is gated by a fixed merchant list (or sub-category) described in `note` rather than applying to the whole category. Used by store/merchant pages to skip cards that would otherwise falsely match (e.g. Apple Card 3% online_shopping is Apple Pay merchants only — does NOT apply to bloomingdales.com).

note.description: Optional caveat or context for the bonus, e.g. an elevated limited-time offer or a portal-valuation figure

category.description: Benefit grouping, e.g. travel, lounge, security, shopping, insurance

value.description: Value of the benefit. Use 0 for non-monetary perks such as lounge access or elite status.

value_unit.description: Unit of `value` when it is not a flat dollar amount. Defaults to dollars.

value_per_cycle.description: Value granted per frequency cycle when it differs from the headline `value`

frequency_years.description: Number of years between occurrences for multi_year benefits

enrollment_required.description: Whether the cardholder must enroll or activate to receive the benefit

merchants.description: Store slugs (from data/stores/) this credit applies at. Surfaces the card in a 'Statement credits' block on each of those /best-card-for/<slug> pages. Statement credits are fixed capped dollar amounts, not earn rates, so they get their own section instead of competing in the rate-ranked list. Use for merchant-linked credits like the CSR StubHub credit (merchants: [stubhub, viagogo]). Every slug must exist as a store; build-cards fails otherwise.

apr.description: APR details including intro offers and regular rate (optional)

check_ignore.description: Field paths the automated check scripts (check-card-pages, check-card-rewards-and-benefits) skip when proposing updates, e.g. "annual_fee" or "apr.purchase_intro.months". Build-time only — stripped from cards.json output.
